title: OpenEPCIS EUDR Vocabulary
description:
EUDR-specific vocabulary for EU Deforestation Regulation 2023/1115 compliance.

IMPORTANT: The EUDR extension properties defined here are NOT YET STANDARDISED by GS1.
These are OpenEPCIS extensions for origin data that have no equivalent in GS1 standards.

EPCIS 2.0 Extension:
This vocabulary is a first-class EPCIS 2.0 extension per Section 12.3. Declare it using:
  GS1-Extensions: eudr=https://ref.openepcis.io/extensions/eu/eudr/

Two-Layer Approach:
1. GS1 EUDR Standard - gs1:RegulatoryNotification for B2B DDS reference sharing
2. OpenEPCIS eudr: extensions - Origin data (harvest dates, species, geolocation details)

This vocabulary provides:
- Domain-specific enumerations (CommodityType, RiskLevel, TimberProductType)
- Extension properties for EUDR-required origin data
- Documentation of EUDR concepts for implementation guidance

For master data, use standard GS1 Web Vocabulary:
- gs1:Place for locations (including plots of land)
- gs1:GeoCoordinates for point locations
- gs1:GeoShape with gs1:polygon for polygon boundaries
- gs1:Organization for supply chain actors
- gs1:Product for commodities
- gs1:QuantitativeValue for measurements

For regulatory compliance:
- Use gs1:RegulatoryNotification (GS1 EUDR Standard) for B2B DDS sharing
- Use EPCIS ObjectEvent with bizStep 'notifying' and persistentDisposition 'subject_to_regulation'
- Use gs1:masterDataAvailableFor for inline master data

Key Insight: GS1 EUDR Standard provides B2B messaging for DDS references but does NOT cover
harvest dates, species names, or detailed origin data - these require eudr: extensions.

References:
- GS1 EUDR Standard: https://ref.gs1.org/standards/eudr/
- GS1 EUDR-tool: https://github.com/gs1/EUDR-tool
- GS1 Germany EUDR Guideline V1.11: https://www.gs1-germany.de/branchen-themen/nachhaltigkeit/eu-deforestation-regulation-eudr/
- EU Regulation 2023/1115: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R1115

classes.label: Due Diligence Statement
classes.comment: A due diligence statement submitted to the EUDR Information System (EUIS) per Article 4.

classes.label: Exemption Declaration
classes.comment: A structured declaration that specific products (or batches/serials) are exempt from EUDR due diligence obligations, carrying the exemption type, reason code, scope, and effective date range.

classes.label: Origin Details
classes.comment: Container class for geolocation and producer identification information per EUDR Article 9.

classes.label: Risk Assessment
classes.comment: Risk assessment results per EUDR Article 10.

properties.label: Area Hectares
properties.comment: Area size in hectares.

properties.label: Area Size
properties.comment: Quantitative value for field area size. Use unitCode 'HAR' (hectare), 'ARE' (are), or 'MTK' (m²) per UN/CEFACT Rec 20.

properties.label: Commodity Type
properties.comment: The EUDR commodity category.

properties.label: Country List
properties.comment: List of countries of origin where geolocations are located.

properties.label: Country Risk Category
properties.comment: Risk category of the country of origin per EU benchmarking (Article 29).

properties.label: Deforestation Free Date
properties.comment: Date confirming deforestation-free status. Must be after 31 Dec 2020 cutoff.

properties.label: Derived From
properties.comment: Reference to source product(s) from which this product was derived.

properties.label: Due Diligence Statement
properties.comment: Reference to the EUDR due diligence statement for this product.

properties.label: Exemption Authority
properties.comment: The economic operator or competent authority asserting this exemption. Uses oec:OperatorInformation so the party is fully identified by GLN and role.

properties.label: Exemption Declaration
properties.comment: Links a product or EPCIS event to an EUDR exemption declaration.

properties.label: Exemption Effective From
properties.comment: Start date of the exemption's validity. Before this date the exemption does not apply.

properties.label: Exemption Effective Until
properties.comment: End date of the exemption's validity. Required for temporary exemptions; omitted for permanent exemptions.

properties.label: Exemption Reason Code
properties.comment: Coded reason for the exemption, drawn from the controlled vocabulary defined by GS1 standardization (aligned with EANCOM C273:DE7009 exemption reason codes).

properties.label: Exemption Scope
properties.comment: The scope of the exemption: 'gtin' (all products with the given GTIN), 'batch' (specific lot/batch identified via AI 10), or 'serial' (specific instance identified via AI 21 or AI 8006 ITIP).

properties.label: Exemption Scope Reference
properties.comment: The specific batch, lot, or serial identifier (or list thereof) that is in scope of a temporary exemption. For 'batch' scope this is the lot/batch number; for 'serial' scope it is the serial number.

properties.label: Exemption Type
properties.comment: The classification of this exemption (permanent or temporary).

properties.label: Forest Management Unit
properties.comment: Identifier of forest management unit or concession.

properties.label: FSC Certification
properties.comment: Reference to FSC (Forest Stewardship Council) certification.

properties.label: Geofence
properties.comment: Area polygon as array of longitude-latitude coordinates per CBV 2.0, 9.3.1. Use for plots > 4 hectares.

properties.label: Geolocation
properties.comment: Geographic coordinates as Geo URI (RFC 5870). Use for plots <= 4 hectares.

properties.label: Land Use History
properties.comment: Description of land use history supporting deforestation-free claims.

properties.label: Legally Harvested
properties.comment: Confirmation that commodity was legally harvested per country of production laws.

properties.label: Mitigation Measures
properties.comment: Description of risk mitigation measures applied per Article 10.2.

properties.label: Origin Details
properties.comment: Container for geolocation and producer identification.

properties.label: Origin List
properties.comment: List of origin details (one per geolocation or polygon).

properties.label: Producer Identification
properties.comment: Identification of the producer. Prefer party GLN when available.

properties.label: Risk Assessment
properties.comment: Risk assessment associated with the due diligence statement.

properties.label: Risk Assessment Date
properties.comment: Date the risk assessment was conducted.

properties.label: Risk Level
properties.comment: Risk level per EUDR country benchmarking.

properties.label: Species Common Name
properties.comment: Common name of the species.

properties.label: Species Scientific Name
properties.comment: Scientific (Latin) name of the species. Required per EUDR Article 9.1.c.

properties.label: Statement Date
properties.comment: Date the due diligence statement was submitted to EUIS.

properties.label: Timber Product Type
properties.comment: Specific type of timber product.

properties.label: Transformation Date
properties.comment: Date when commodity was processed/transformed.

properties.label: Transformation Location
properties.comment: Location where the commodity transformation/processing took place.

properties.label: Verification Method
properties.comment: Method used to verify deforestation-free and legality claims.

properties.label: Volume Cubic Meters
properties.comment: Volume in cubic meters.

enumerations.label: Actor Role
enumerations.comment: Role of an actor in the EUDR supply chain per Article 2.

values.label: Downstream Operator
values.comment: Entity that receives products already placed on the EU market and makes them available further downstream, subject to simplified due diligence obligations.

values.label: Operator
values.comment: Entity that places products on EU market or exports from EU (Article 2.15).

values.label: Trader
values.comment: Entity that makes products available on market after operator (Article 2.17).

enumerations.label: Commodity Type
enumerations.comment: The seven commodities regulated by EUDR (EU 2023/1115, Article 1.1). Use unitCode 'HAR' (hectare), 'ARE' (are), or 'MTK' (m²) per UN/CEFACT Rec 20.

values.label: Cocoa
values.comment: Cocoa beans, chocolate, cocoa products (HS code 18).

values.label: Soya
values.comment: Soybeans, soy oil, soy meal (HS codes 12, 15, 23).

enumerations.label: Exemption Type
enumerations.comment: Classification of EUDR exemption per duration: permanent (e.g., already-verified origin) or temporary (batch- or serial-scoped).

values.label: Permanent Exemption
values.comment: Exemption that applies to all future batches/instances of a given GTIN without expiry (e.g., verified low-risk origin).

values.label: Temporary Exemption
values.comment: Exemption that applies to specific batches or serial numbers within a defined time period. Requires scope identification (batch/lot or serial list).

enumerations.label: Risk Level
enumerations.comment: Risk classification levels per EUDR benchmarking system (Article 29).

values.label: High
values.comment: High-risk country. Enhanced due diligence and monitoring required.

values.label: Low
values.comment: Low-risk country per EU benchmarking. Standard verification required.

values.label: Negligible
values.comment: Derived from already-verified low-risk sources. Simplified due diligence permitted.

enumerations.label: Timber Product Type
enumerations.comment: Types of timber/wood products regulated by EUDR Annex I.
